title: Wands of Combat
description: A combat-specialized magic expansion featuring uniquely crafted wands with special abilities, ultimates, and passives. Multiplayer friendly.
body:
![A top to bottom fading image of a campfire on some snowy grass area, with the 5 wands of the mod visible as dropped items around the campfire. It is night time and the sky has aurora borealis. At the faded out area at the bottom, it says "Wands of Combat" with "By Sabio" and "Tested & Balanced by MicroDude9"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c619727535b3d0dd645cce4ec8f519c9a63a469d_0.webp)

**Welcome** to the world of _**Wands of Combat** (WoC)_. In this mod, you'll have the opportunity to craft **unique** and _powerful_ wands or discover _ancient_ and **mind-blowing** wands. This can range from wands that **freeze your enemies** to wands that allow you to **latch onto players and mobs**! > This mod is under **heavy development**. The current version of the mod **will be** changed _**significantly**_ over the updates it will receive. ![hr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ef6b8eb5bc66fcf87cd276409f6705a1fbc79b.png) ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4517bf16c9f8721c3b11070eeab1e32dd133beb1.png) - 5 **unique** wands - Combo Triggers - Passive Abilities - Abilities _(right click)_ - Alternate Abilities _(r)_ - Ultimates _(shift+right click)_ ![hr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ef6b8eb5bc66fcf87cd276409f6705a1fbc79b.png) ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1464a31fe7a8594359a9c2b1656c61902f515a_0.webp) ![Magical Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39137361a8856eb54161314715d64e555edda872_0.webp) ![The crafting recipe for a magical stick. It is one stick in the middle-top slot, one stick in the middle-bottom slot, a diamond on the left-center slot, a diamond on the right-center slot and an obsidian on the center slot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9c45a4762f8415e5da3a16b9fccb43efa4766b.png) This item is used to craft for all craftable wands. It is a mix between diamonds and obsidian, creating a powerful source of magic. ![Wands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7fd962a8b270c89859d1e8ae22b138f71a5110_0.webp) ![Magnet Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398bcf18f95942fa53090e19f95fdc293e03e021_0.webp) ![The crafting recipe for the magnet wand. It is 1 magical stick on the bottom left corner, 1 magical stick in the center and 1 iron block in the top right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac52bc8220a552096cabe6983c63d4b1a1c3fe9e.png) A support class wand that can pull and repel entities. This wand is the only wand to have alternate abilities. ### Passive #### Item Magnet Pulls dropped items and experience orbs towards you in an 8 block radius. ### Combo Trigger #### Magnetization 🕑 3 hits Increases pull speeds by 8% for that entity specifically. Resets every 2 minutes. ### Ability #### Pull ⌛ 30s Pulls entities towards you in a 12 block radius. ### Alternate Ability #### Repel ⌛ 30s Knocks back entities in an 8 block radius, doing 6 damage (3 hearts) to the repelled entities. ![Ice Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed73921c074e0d97be85b486568ea83c82f765e.png) ![A crafting recipe for the ice wand. One magical stick in the bottom left corner, one breeze rod in the center, one blue ice on the top right corner, one blue ice on the center right slot, one blue ice on the top center slot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed7c1da46a88359efcd5a0f0e92e96b709d79a6.png) A support-offense class wand that can freeze or slow enemies. It can also send a spiked ice attack that does a high amount of damage. ### Combo Trigger #### Spiked Ice 🕑 6 hits The ability stops you from moving and taking any damage for 2 seconds and sends spiked ice towards a targeted mob. It has a 6.66 block range and does 22 damage (11 hearts). ### Ability #### Freeze ⌛ 20s (Mobs), 30s (Players) For mobs, using this ability in a 8 block radius would give them Slowness 127 for 4 seconds. However, using this ability targeted towards player in a 12 block radius would give them Slowness 2 for 4 seconds. ![Electric Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/397bb6a011a1794975ce036bf3688967c86236a5.png) ![The crafting recipe for the lightning wand. A magical stick on the bottom left, a magical stick in the center, a lightning rod on the top right, a block of copper on the top center, a block of copper on the center right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d438958b67a3ba4537b4697322d8495814649a.png) An offense class wand that can summon lightning, create skeletons, and cause a thunderstorm of death. ### Passive #### Electric Negation Receive immunity to all lightning damage, natural and from other electric wands. ### Combo Trigger #### Zap 🕑 3 hits Summon a lightning bolt that hits the entity that you attacked. Does 5 damage. ### Ability #### Thunderstorm ⌛ 30s In a 16 block radius, for every entity within that radius, summon 3 lightning bolts, which are each apart from each other by 10 ticks (500ms), which hit the entities. It will stun the entities (and prevent them from attacking) for 1.5s. Then, after a period of time, it would summon neutral skeletons with a stone sword to only attack the entity that the lightning has been summoned one. If there are multiple targets, it will spawn a neutral skeleton for each target. The skeleton cannot target anything else except for the targeted entities. ![Phantom Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbcdf5865bc6781c18f7f4c7e5d12e4097049be8.png) ![The crafting recipe for the phantom wand. One magical stick on the bottom left, one magical stick in the center and one crying obsidian in the top right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e10c5359da5a4f65a12ab99eb68ffecc17b3e7c0.png) A movement class wand that can latch onto enemies and fly. > **Fun Fact:** > The Phantom Wand has been nerfed multiple times before the release of Wands of Combat. There used to have a shorter ability cooldown and no slowness or darkness effects. ### Passive #### Latching The phantom wand has an increased reach of 5 blocks (3 -> 5) and would make the player latch onto the target if the player has hit the target from 3-5 blocks away. ### Ability #### Haunt ⌛ 60s Allow the user to fly, but with slowness IV, and blindness for 6 seconds. Whilst flying, your attack damage is reduced by 80%. ![Magma Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74bf807f2614d62a2e48c9d921379e9cb7e33641.png) ![The crafting recipe for the magma wand. One magical stick on the bottom left, one magical stick on the center and one magma block on the top right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c81c120cd597db51743823c8319623cd9a081ac.png) A defensive wand that could launch non-destructive yet powerful fireballs, grant health buffers, allow healing using fire and creating a fire ring around the player. ### Passive #### Magma Shield Unlike a regular Minecraft shield, the Magma Shield is not an item nor a physically visible shield. It is 2 absorption hearts in the player's health bar. Players (holding the wand) can automatically gain the Magma Shield after 30 seconds of not receiving any damage. Upon damaging and "breaking" the two hearts, it will cause all nearby entities within 6 blocks to be knocked away from the player. Then, it will give the player fire resistance and strength for both a minute, and resistance for 1:30. ### Combo Trigger #### Fireball ⌛ 5 hits Summon a fireball that shoots at the target that does 5 damage when hit but does not destroy blocks or spread fire. ### Ability #### Inner Healing ⌛ 60s Every fire damage tick, heal the player by 0.1 health points (0.05 hearts) and extinguish the fire. Lasts for 45 seconds. ### Ultimate #### Fire Ring ⌛ 90s Spawn a ring of fire that moves with you that burns everything in its path. Lasts for 30 seconds. ![hr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ef6b8eb5bc66fcf87cd276409f6705a1fbc79b.png) ![FaQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bc810553357238e54365fd8ec5794297eb8f51b.png) ![Will there be a (Neo)Forge port for this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e2eef96bf095e7570fb733e073a29c8b766767.png) Nope. ![Will there be a 1.20.1 port for this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eac72c2ea07eec7756029346ef9505ebb36915ef_0.webp) Not likely. ![Will there be translations for this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c713f59050e904ec58e9bab8b5cc3ca58b4d84ce_0.webp) Probably not, but you can help translate! Create a pull request on the GitHub Repository to add your language of choice!
